Class GuestMakeReservationController

java.lang.Object
Controllers.BaseReservationController
Controllers.GuestMakeReservationController
All Implemented Interfaces:
AvailableTimesListener
public class GuestMakeReservationController extends BaseReservationController
Controller for guests to make a reservation without registering as a permanent user. Extends BaseReservationController to provide reservation functionality. Handles input validation for email or phone and submits reservations for guests.

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Initializes the controller. Sets up the date picker limits and assigns the number of diners field.
      Overrides:
      initialize in class BaseReservationController

    • onCheckAvailability

      private void onCheckAvailability()
      Handles the "Check Availability" action. Validates the email or phone input before checking available reservation times.

    • onSubmitOrder

      private void onSubmitOrder()
      Handles the submission of the guest reservation. Validates email or phone input and submits the reservation.

    • onPreviousPage

      private void onPreviousPage()
      Navigates back to the guest reservation UI.

    • isEmail

      private boolean isEmail(String input)
      Validates whether the input string is an email.
      Parameters:
      input - the string to validate
      Returns:
      true if the input matches an email pattern, false otherwise

    • isPhone

      private boolean isPhone(String input)
      Validates whether the input string is a phone number.
      Parameters:
      input - the string to validate
      Returns:
      true if the input matches a phone number pattern, false otherwise

    • generateGuestId

      private int generateGuestId()
      Generates a random guest ID between 10000 and 20000.
      Returns:
      a randomly generated guest ID

    • generateUniqueGuestId

      private int generateUniqueGuestId()
      Generates a unique guest ID.
      Returns:
      a unique guest ID

    • createGuestUser

      private int createGuestUser(String email, String phone)
      Creates a guest user with the provided email and phone. Sends a registration request to the server.
      Parameters:
      email - the guest's email address
      phone - the guest's phone number
      Returns:
      the guest ID assigned by the system

    • submitGuestReservation

      private void submitGuestReservation(String email, String phone)
      Submits a reservation for a guest with the specified email and phone. Sets the current guest ID and sends the reservation to the server.
      Parameters:
      email - the guest's email address
      phone - the guest's phone number

    • submitAlternativeReservation

      protected void submitAlternativeReservation(LocalDate date, LocalTime time, int diners)
      Submits an alternative reservation for a guest when the original date/time is unavailable. Creates a new guest user if necessary and sends the reservation to the server.
      Overrides:
      submitAlternativeReservation in class BaseReservationController
      Parameters:
      date - the alternative reservation date
      time - the alternative reservation time
      diners - the number of diners for the reservation
